generated_oml:
instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring internal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor1Transmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring internal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempSensor2Transmitted
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for ambient environment monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempSensorTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor1Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1
]

instance InternalTempSensor2Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempSensorTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTempSensor
]

instance InternalTempSensor1Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated temperature data from internal sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor1Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessingModule, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance InternalTempSensor2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated temperature data from internal sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempSensor2Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessingModule, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance ExternalTempSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated ambient temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempSensorTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessingModule, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance HeatbedHeater : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary actuator for thermal output control in incubator system"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for air circulation in incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated container structure for maintaining thermal environment"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded microcontroller for system control and data processing"
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model representing structural components of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataProcessingModule
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations to represent thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance ThermalSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with adjustable parameters for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for adjusting model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveThermalSimulation
]

instance SensorDataProcessingModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Sensor data processing module for ingestion and initial processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperatureMonitoring
]

instance ControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control logic for managing heatbed and fan actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalProcessOptimization, FaultDetectionAndSafetyMonitoring
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring using sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveThermalSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of thermal dynamics using calibrated models for forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalForecastInsight
]

instance ThermalProcessOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heating and cooling processes via control algorithms to maintain desired temperature setpoints"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalHeatingAction, OptimalFanAction
]

instance FaultDetectionAndSafetyMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated fault detection and safety monitoring to identify deviations from operational norms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature status and trends"
]

instance ThermalForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted thermal behavior under varying conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of operational deviations requiring intervention"
]

instance OptimalHeatingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed heater output to maintain setpoint temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed for air circulation to regulate temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedContainer, RaspberryPiController, HeatbedHeater, Fan, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment using sensor data, with resulting data informing monitors that assess system safety and optimality. Violations detected by monitors trigger human or algorithmic interventions on the Physical Twin, as depicted in Figure 1 of Document 1."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through empirical comparison of simulation predictions against physical measurements, where the four-parameter thermal model demonstrated superior accuracy in predicting heatbed thermal inertia compared to the two-parameter model. Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data to correct discrepancies and maintain model validity."
]
